chattranslation.config.title: Chat Translation Settings
chattranslation.config.target_language.t: Language code for translation (e.g. zh-CN, en, ja, ko). Use 'auto' to follow your Minecraft language setting.
chattranslation.config.translate_outgoin: Translate ordinary chat messages before sending. Commands are never translated.
chattranslation.config.outgoing_target_l: Language used when translating messages you send.
chattranslation.config.translation_servi: Choose a free translation service, or use your own AI-compatible endpoint.
chattranslation.config.show_original.too: Keep showing original message alongside translation.
chattranslation.config.translate_all_mes: Translate all chat and system messages, not just player chat.
chattranslation.config.notice: Saving reloads the selected translation provider immediately. Insecure SSL should only be enabled temporarily for troubleshooting.
